title: [MTR3] Vande Bharat (White) - Indian Railways
description: Add the iconic Vande Bharat Express to your Minecraft world with realistic textures and smooth integration for transit mods like MTR. Ideal for modern Indian railway builds.
body:
## 🚄 Vande Bharat Express – Train Resource Pack

Bring India's iconic **Vande Bharat Express** to life in Minecraft with this high-quality **train resource pack**! Designed for transit mods like **MTR (Minecraft Transit Railway)**, this pack adds a modern, realistic Indian train experience to your world.
                                                            ![Front Angle](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84c601f17a59aa7e14c38ae84f101d45e961a45b.png)
                                                            
---

### ✨ Features:

* **Accurate exterior design** based on the real Vande Bharat Express
* Sleek textures, smooth curves, and true-to-life color scheme
* Lightweight and performance-optimized
* Ideal for Indian railway-themed builds and transit networks

---

### ⚠️ Current Status: **Beta Release**

This is a **beta version** – some features like interior detailing or lighting effects may be missing or incomplete.
We’re actively working on improvements and **regular updates** will be released with new features, refinements, and bug fixes.

---

### ⚠️ Warnings:
* Not supported in MTR4 until further notice/version release.
* Driver cabin, toilets, and other interior upgrades will be added in future versions.
* Make sure your **platform is only 1 block above the track**. Since this is a **broad-gauge train**, higher platforms may visually collide with the train body.
            ![Platform Height Collision](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64f08f843aaf5309b1cda77bcab477d8b01e0be7.png)
* We recommend using a **broad gauge rail pack** for best visual alignment and realism with this train model.
* There may be multiple texture errors or inconsistencies in this beta version. We are constantly working to fix them, and we’d love your help!

  👉 Please report any bugs or visual glitches in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2bGWEmvjvZ) so we can address them in future updates.
---

### 📦 Requirements:

* **[Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u)** – Base Mod
* **[NTE Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/8pXSjgW8)** – for extended functionality or dependencies
* **Broad Gauge Rail Pack** *(optional but recommended)* – ensures accurate alignment with the train model

---

### 🛠️ Installation:

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Place it into your mod’s resource pack folder (e.g., `mtr/resource_packs`)
3. Enable it in-game
4. Select the Vande Bharat train in your mod’s UI

---

Whether you're recreating Indian railway routes or building your dream HSR network, the **Vande Bharat Express** adds realism and flair to your transit system.


**📥 Download now and follow for updates as we continue to build India’s fastest train in Minecraft!**
